item.title: 🚀 Skyrocketing！ 🚀 (200+ new stars) 📦 hasaneyldrm / exerc…
item.author: GitHub Trending (@github-trending.bsky.social)
item.description:
🚀 Skyrocketing！ 🚀 (200+ new stars)

📦 hasaneyldrm / exercises-dataset
⭐ 12,232 (+435)

1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPres...
item.content:encoded:

1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPres...

item.title: 【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖…
item.author: みすず書房 (@misuzushobo.bsky.social)
item.description:
【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖国の運命に翻弄されて移住した他国の言葉と、複数の言葉のなかでどのように自らを語るのか…」

何語で語るか、ねじれた「語圏」
book.asahi.com/article/1671...
item.content:encoded:
【書評】7/11朝日新聞に『世界文学重層』評が掲載されました。評者は酒井啓子さんです。「宗主国の言語と母語と、さらには祖国の運命に翻弄されて移住した他国の言葉と、複数の言葉のなかでどのように自らを語るのか…」

何語で語るか、ねじれた「語圏」
book.asahi.com/article/1671...

item.title: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emb…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes! This track goes crazy! The guitar is absolutely shredding, the drums are bumping, and the trumpets add a hopeful sound to the track! My favorite is the organ, it has an incredible sound! It's an awesome track!
item.content:encoded: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes! This track goes crazy! The guitar is absolutely shredding, the drums are bumping, and the trumpets add a hopeful sound to the track! My favorite is the organ, it has an incredible sound! It's an awesome track!

item.title: Good morning. Happy Monday. The light is compresent. Such is…
item.author: Climb To The Clouds (@climbtotheclouds.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning. Happy Monday.
The light is compresent. Such is a gift. Soothing waves into calmness, movements pleasant. Existing, melding, to calm rifts.
Have a peaceful day.
#BlueSkyMonday #photography #sunsets #longexposure #ocean #sky #clouds #imageandverse #ECK #EastCoastKin #capecod
item.content:encoded:
Good morning. Happy Monday.
The light is compresent. Such is a gift. Soothing waves into calmness, movements pleasant. Existing, melding, to calm rifts.
Have a peaceful day.
#BlueSkyMonday #photography #sunsets #longexposure #ocean #sky #clouds #imageandverse #ECK #EastCoastKin #capecod

item.title: We got a puppy! Everyone say hello to Juno 🤍 I’m going to…
item.author: Chris (@curiopher.bsky.social)
item.description:
We got a puppy! Everyone say hello to Juno 🤍

I’m going to take a couple of weeks off so she feels comfortable in her forever home. But I hope to be back soon with more Paralives and Town to City content. Appreciate you all 💫
item.content:encoded:
We got a puppy! Everyone say hello to Juno 🤍

I’m going to take a couple of weeks off so she feels comfortable in her forever home. But I hope to be back soon with more Paralives and Town to City content. Appreciate you all 💫

item.title: 2 Tage, nachdem Merz im BT das Volk aufs Sparen eingeschwore…
item.author: graudecke66.bsky.social (@graudecke66.eurosky.social)
item.description:
2 Tage, nachdem Merz im BT das Volk aufs Sparen eingeschworen hat, fliegt er mit Gattin (mit dem seinem Privatflieger - davon geh ich aus) mal kurz zum Reichenspocht Tennis ...
Es ist nur noch bitter
😡
item.content:encoded:
2 Tage, nachdem Merz im BT das Volk aufs Sparen eingeschworen hat, fliegt er mit Gattin (mit dem seinem Privatflieger - davon geh ich aus) mal kurz zum Reichenspocht Tennis ...
Es ist nur noch bitter
😡

item.title: Zaman insanın en değerli hazinesidir onu israf etmemeli Made…
item.author: EMEKLİ ASKER (@emeklipilot.bsky.social)
item.description:
Zaman insanın en değerli hazinesidir
onu israf etmemeli
Madem hepimiz ölüp gideceğimizi biliyoruz
öyleyse hayattan ne istediğimizi bilerek yaşamalıyız

Kendi hayatınıza,
kendi geleceğinize odaklanın.
Yaşlandığında insanın en büyük pişmanlığı, ardında yaşanmamış bir hayat bırakmasıdır

İyi akşamlar
item.content:encoded:
Zaman insanın en değerli hazinesidir
onu israf etmemeli
Madem hepimiz ölüp gideceğimizi biliyoruz
öyleyse hayattan ne istediğimizi bilerek yaşamalıyız

Kendi hayatınıza,
kendi geleceğinize odaklanın.
Yaşlandığında insanın en büyük pişmanlığı, ardında yaşanmamış bir hayat bırakmasıdır

item.title: There is nothing quite so beautiful as a perfect rose, I cre…
item.author: Maryanne Chisholm 🌊 💙 (@maryannechisholm.bsky.social)
item.description:
There is nothing quite so beautiful as a perfect rose, I created this painting as a symbolic representation of the soul. So many charismatic details. My premier pieces are now available as prints on fine art America.

fineartamerica.com/featured/pin...
item.content:encoded:
There is nothing quite so beautiful as a perfect rose, I created this painting as a symbolic representation of the soul. So many charismatic details. My premier pieces are now available as prints on fine art America.

item.title: ICE is a menace to democracy and its murderous conduct shoul…
item.author: The Verge (@theverge.com)
item.description:
ICE is a menace to democracy and its murderous conduct should be soberly considered. But we should also recognize that these people are weak and sad and ought to be made fun of.

Read more: www.theverge.com/policy/96430...
item.content:encoded:
ICE is a menace to democracy and its murderous conduct should be soberly considered. But we should also recognize that these people are weak and sad and ought to be made fun of.

item.title: Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are …
item.author: Max B 💙 🔶 🇺🇦 🇬🇧 🇪🇺 (@maxbrockbank.com)
item.description:
Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are paid the same as the women's team.

In 2017, they took a voluntary pay cut to allow the women's pay to be increased.

The move came from the players' union, not management.
item.content:encoded:
Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are paid the same as the women's team.

In 2017, they took a voluntary pay cut to allow the women's pay to be increased.

The move came from the players' union, not management.

item.title: I went kayaking in a fjord today. That is all.
item.author: Jacqueline Antonovich (@jackiantonovich.bsky.social)
item.description: I went kayaking in a fjord today. That is all.
item.content:encoded: I went kayaking in a fjord today. That is all.
